zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Wise於1222年出生在英國戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾時，她的父親William Wise II26歲，母親Ella de Veterpont22歲。她於大約1244年與William de Godolphin在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Wise于1222年出生在英国戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾时，她的父亲William Wise II26岁，母亲Ella de Veterpont22岁。她于大约1244年与William de Godolphin在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a wise or learned person, from Middle English wise, wisse ‘wise’ (Old English wīs). This name has also absorbed Dutch Wijs and De Wijs, a nickname meaning ‘(the) wise’, and possibly cognates in other languages.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by the withies or willows, from Middle English withi, Old English wīthig ‘withy, willow’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiss   ‘white’.

variants.name: Weiss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Fritz, Manfred, Egon, Armin, Arno, Gunther, Heinz.  Jewish Chaim, Moshe, Emanuel, Aron, Meyer, Mendel, Hyman, Isadore, Zvi, Shlomo.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with white hair or a remarkably pale complexion, from Middle High German wīz, German weiss ‘white’. This surname is also found in Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of a corresponding Slavic surnames, e.g. Slovenian Belec and Bele (see Belle ). It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Denmark, and the Netherlands.

variants.name: Wiseman
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English wise ‘wise, discreet’ (see Wise 1) + man, also wise-man ‘wise, thoughtful, rational, skilled, or intelligent person, a cunning man’ (Old English wīs + mann). The name may also have been used ironically.

variants.name: Wyse
meanings: English and Irish (Waterford and Cork): mainly Irish and Scottish spelling of Wise . The name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was also Gaelicized as de Uidheas.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Wise was born in 1222, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, her father, William Wise II, was 26 and her mother, Ella de Veterpont, was 22. She married William de Godolphin about 1244, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Wise est née en 1222, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Wise II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ella de Veterpont, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William de Godolphin environ 1244, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Wise 1222 in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Wise II 26 und ihre Mutter Ella de Veterpont 22. Sie hat um 1244 in Cornwall, England William de Godolphin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Wise è nata il nel 1222 nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, sua padre, William Wise II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Ella de Veterpont, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William de Godolphin circa 1244, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Wiseが1222年にイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルで生まれた時，父William Wise IIは26歳，母Ella de Veterpontは22歳であった。約1244年にイギリスコルンワルでWilliam de Godolphinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスコルンワルゴドルフィン クロスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Wise(이)가 1222년 영국 데폰 시데함 다머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Wise II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ella de Veterpont(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1244년 영국 코른월에서 William de Godolphin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 고돌필 크로스에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William de Godolphin aproximadamente 1244, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Wise родилась в 1222 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Wise II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ella de Veterpont, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Godolphin около 1244 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
